task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the correct study in OpenClinica.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenClinica web interface is visible with 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' or 'DM-TRIAL-2024' shown as the active study (usually in the top navigation or study selection screen).

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the target subject SS_101.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject Matrix or View Subject page is open, clearly displaying the Study Subject ID 'SS_101'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated scheduling for the 'Screening Visit' event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Schedule Study Event' screen, popup, or form is visible, specifically indicating it is for the 'Screening Visit' event and subject 'SS_101'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct start date was entered into the scheduling form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Start Date/Time input field on the scheduling form contains '01/15/2025' or '2025-01-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct location was entered into the scheduling form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Location input field on the scheduling form contains 'Boston General Hospital - Clinical Research Unit'.

task_completion.description: Verify the event was successfully scheduled and saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message stating the event was scheduled, or the Subject Matrix showing the 'Screening Visit' column for SS_101 updated to a 'Scheduled' status (often indicated by a specific icon or text).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenClinica GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (e.g., Chromium, Firefox) navigating the OpenClinica web application, not a terminal executing curl/SQL commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually filled out the form rather than just typing the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs for date and location are visible inside the actual OpenClinica HTML form fields.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not modify the control subjects (SS_102, SS_103).
integrity.visual_evidence: If the Subject Matrix is visible, the rows for SS_102 and SS_103 should not show any newly scheduled events (their 'Screening Visit' status should remain empty/unscheduled).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Study: 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' (ID: DM-TRIAL-2024). Target Subject: SS_101. Target Event: 'Screening Visit'. Expected Date: 01/15/2025 (or 2025-01-15). Expected Location: 'Boston General Hospital - Clinical Research Unit' (substrings 'boston general' or 'clinical research unit' are acceptable). Control Subjects (must not be modified): SS_102, SS_103. Expected Status: Scheduled (Status ID 1).
